subcodes.first_line: O flourishing branch and tender offshoot of the Divine Lote-Tree, open thou thy tongue in thanksgiving unto His holiness, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النضیر و الفنن اللطیف من السدره الربانیه زبان بشکرانه حضرت احدیت بگشا و
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation, @Shrines and Holy places
